poll.question: When Marcus scouts the far side of the island for shelter, does Judy ask him to stay or trust the promise holds across distance?

options.label: Trust the promise
options.desc: It's strong enough to survive separation—he chose to stay with you, and he will come back.

options.label: Ask him to stay
options.desc: Some promises need time before they're tested by distance—certainty matters more than supplies today.

in_play.label: Yes, build it
in_play.desc: Love first—they're staying, they're choosing, they can share
